nasb.text: For You, O my God, have revealed to Your servant that You will build for him a house; therefore Your servant has found courage to pray before You.

esv.text: For you, my God, have revealed to your servant that you will build a house for him. Therefore your servant has found courage to pray before you.

cnv.text: 我的　神啊，因為你啟示了你的僕人，要你的僕人為你建造殿宇，所以你僕人才敢在你面前這樣禱告。

ccb.text: 我的上帝啊，因为你曾启示仆人，说要为仆人建立王朝，仆人才敢这样向你祈求。
